2179910.name: Fantasy Grounds - Magical Trails Dice Pack
2179910.description:
Magical Trails Dice Pack

Add custom dice to your virtual tabletop and roll with style. These dice come in a variety of different colors and textures that work with new animated effects that show up when you roll them.
This pack includes the following 20 dice:
  • Magical trail  effect (arcane, earth, fire, frost, life, light, lightning, shadow, storm, and water)
  • Mesh Glow  trail effect (arcane, earth, fire, frost, life, light, lightning, shadow, storm, and water)
These dice are digital only items for use within Fantasy Grounds Unity. Dice Packs are linked with individual users. Other connected players and Gamemasters will be able to see your dice roll on their screen for any non-hidden rolls, but Dice Packs are not sharable. 

Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Doug Davison, Joshua Watmough, and Joshua Utter
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
